headline: Truist Lowers Accenture (ACN) Target to $260, Warns of Pressure on Long-Term Estimates
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 10, Truist lowered its price recommendation on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) to $260 from $317. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares ahead of the company’s Q2 results. headline: How The Story On PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) Is Evolving With Shifting Street Targets
summary: PNC Financial Services Group’s modeled fair value edges from US$251.45 to US$251.90, a very small price target adjustment that keeps the overall story broadly consistent with prior work. This kind of tweak lines up with recent Street research, where analysts are lifting targets in dollar terms but remain split between more optimistic and more cautious views on the regional bank group. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting signals and what they might mean for your own PNC...

headline: How The NerdWallet (NRDS) Story Is Shifting With Q4 Beats And Lower Valuation Targets
summary: NerdWallet’s latest analyst update trims its modeled fair value from US$16.17 to US$15.33, a reduction of about 5.2%, while several Street price targets have also moved to around US$15 to US$18. Analysts tying these changes to recent commentary point to a mix of Q4 outperformance, category level weakness, and valuation resets in their updated views. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives fit together and what to watch if you are tracking NerdWallet over...
